title: CPVP Christmas Pack 16x
description: A Crystal PVP Christmas Pack with the cpvp items retextured in Christmas themed versions
body:
A Texture Pack made for CPVP and revamps all the pvp items in a Christmas themed style and gives them a brand new look the Pack contains Following things:

- New Glowstone
- New Obsidian
- New Ender Pearl
- New Low Fire
- New Totem
- New Hud
- New Crossbow
- New Netherite Axe
- New Netherite Pickaxe
- New Netherite Sword
- New Netherite Armor
- New Mace
- New Diamond Armor
- New Inventory
- New Hotbar
- New Potions
- New Golden Apples
- New End Crystals
- New Respawn Anchor
- And more...
